title: XO Phase 2 Supervised Tutor Program Envelope
rationale: Create the parent bead that codifies the non-negotiable operating law for all Phase 2 work: one-child scope, guardian-started sessions, lesson-bound tutoring only, trust-preserving disclosure, and first-class guardian authority. This bead exists to hold the contract and sequence for the seven child beads.
focus_hint: Treat this as the governance bead for sequencing and acceptance, not an implementation bead. Every child bead must inherit the same safety and trust constraints.
acceptance_criteria: Parent bead lists xo-phase2-bead-01 through xo-phase2-bead-07 in execution order
Program contract states no tutor response without a valid one-child session envelope
Program contract states tutoring remains lesson-bound and guardian-governed
Program contract states summaries are disclosure-shaped and never transcript dumps
Program contract defines verification burden as Lore, Isolation, and Audit across all child beads
